title: Startup India Recognition
description: Eligible startups can obtain DPIIT Startup India recognition to access government benefits, networking opportunities, tax exemptions and easier compliance.

title: Startup India Seed Fund Scheme
description: Provides financial assistance to early-stage startups through approved incubators for proof of concept, prototype development, product trials and market entry.

title: Income Tax Exemption
description: Eligible DPIIT-recognized startups may claim income tax exemption for a specified period subject to government eligibility criteria.

title: Self Certification
description: Recognized startups can self-certify compliance under selected labour and environmental laws during the initial years.

title: Startup India Hub
description: Provides access to mentors, investors, incubators, accelerators and startup resources through a centralized platform.

title: Patent Support
description: Eligible startups receive support for patent filing, faster examination and reduced intellectual property filing costs.

title: Public Procurement
description: Recognized startups receive relaxed eligibility criteria while participating in certain government procurement opportunities.

title: Credit Guarantee
description: Government-backed credit support helps startups obtain business financing with reduced collateral requirements under applicable schemes.
